Steps: 1. Click on 'Warranty Policy' link in footer or navigation
Expected Result: The current warranty policy and terms are clearly displayed
Actual Result: Policy page correctly displayed with clear terms.

Preconditions: User is logged in and has a valid order
Steps: 1. Navigate to Warranty page\n2. Fill in the form with Order ID and description\n3. Click 'Submit'
Expected Result: A success message 'Claim submitted successfully' is shown; Admin can see the new claim
Actual Result: Form submitted and success message shown.

Steps: 1. Open the Admin dashboard\n2. Navigate to 'Warranty Claims' management
Expected Result: The list of all submitted claims is displayed in chronological order
Actual Result: Admin can see the claim in the list.

Steps: 1. Select an incomplete claim from the list\n2. Click 'Reject'\n3. Provide rejection reason 'Incomplete information'
Expected Result: The claim status updates to 'Rejected' and the customer is notified (if implemented)
Actual Result: Claim status changed to Rejected correctly.

Steps: 1. Attempt to file a warranty claim
Expected Result: User is prompted to log in before submitting the form
Actual Result: Form is still accessible without login.
